note: Research-backed Activation Manager MT set. Operator may add, remove, split, or reorder MTs ad hoc; packet.json microtasks.declared_ids must be kept in sync when the MT set changes.

microtasks.summary: Keep SPEC_CURRENT and the packet contract aligned with the modern ModelLane exchange architecture.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks current spec/packet authority so later MTs implement the same ModelLane contract.

microtasks.summary: Add backend schemas/types for ModelLaneRun, ModelLane, ModelLaneMessage, and lane status.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks durable Rust/PostgreSQL lane schemas that every local/cloud/subagent message can cite and replay.

microtasks.summary: Normalize launch adapters for local, cloud, CLI, human, subagent, and validator lanes; REOPENED 2026-07-01 to make the default LlmClient resolve through the embedded ModelRuntime and remove the Ollama daemon adapter default (CPU-baseline engine features; non-authoritative ExternalEngineImport compat lane retained).
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks normalized launch/reclaim paths for local, cloud, CLI, human, subagent, and validator lanes.

microtasks.summary: Implement coordinator routing policies and explicit advisory-to-authority promotion.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks deterministic coordinator routing and safe advisory-to-authority promotion.

microtasks.summary: Route model-to-model handoff through ContextBundle and artifact references.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks restart-safe model-to-model handoff through ContextBundle, artifact refs, Loom, FEMS, and CRDT proposals.

microtasks.summary: Enforce cloud projection, consent, and authority boundaries for cloud lanes.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks cloud use without hidden data leakage by enforcing projection, consent, fan-out/revocation, and advisory-only output.

microtasks.summary: Add lane recovery, orphan detection, replay, and diagnostics state.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks recovery from crash, cancellation, missing payload, orphan lane, lease expiry, and stale CRDT state without chat history.

microtasks.summary: Expose readable swarm lane/message diagnostics in UI/debug surfaces.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks inspectable lane diagnostics through native/debug TraceProjection surfaces without naming the separate internal viewing tool.

microtasks.summary: Build validation harnesses and negative cases for mixed cloud/local/subagent lane runs.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks proof that mixed model lanes fail closed under negative cases, concurrency, process ownership, and replay loss scenarios.

microtasks.summary: Update no-context model manual and backend navigation for lane launch, exchange, diagnostics, and recovery.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks no-context model/operator use of the lane system through canonical UserManual and backend navigation.

microtasks.summary: Update the internal UserManual so every WP behavior is usable by future models/operators and linked to Flight Recorder plus Palmistry posture.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks WP-wide manual currency so every implemented behavior is discoverable, recoverable, and tied to evidence.

microtasks.summary: Operator work-surface: interactive native chat/launch pane to pick local/cloud model + folder/worktree, launch via Dexterity SwarmCoordinator, and capture CLI conversation/thought/tool-calls as ModelLaneMessage wired to Flight Recorder. OPERATOR_REQUESTED_ADDITION 2026-07-01, pending scope confirmation.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks operator-driven local/cloud model sessions inside Handshake with typed CLI-wrapper capture.

microtasks.summary: Embedded ModelRuntime real-load conformance: box the default embedded model-load path under a SandboxAdapter + emit ProcessOwnershipLedger START/STOP (master-spec 3.6.2/4.6.1), and emit Flight Recorder on DisabledLlmClient/fail-closed paths (4.2.3.2(3)); validated with a REAL Candle load. DEFERRED_FROM_MT-003 2026-07-01.
microtasks.unlocks: Closes the master-spec 3.6.2/4.6.1 HARD boxing/ledger gap on the default embedded local model path and the FR-on-error gap.

microtasks.summary: Shared/enumerable/labeled default-LlmClient model registry (UUIDv7->display_name) for MT-008 labeling, MT-012 picker, Work Profiles provider_ref resolution; + LoomSearchV2 embedding-model contract (degrade-not-error on 768-dim mismatch). DEFERRED_FROM_MT-003 2026-07-01.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks local-model labeling in diagnostics, enumeration in the operator picker, Work Profiles resolution, and crash-free Loom reindex on embedding-dim mismatch.

microtasks.summary: Operator-facing cloud-model access config surface: CLI-bridge/plan auth+login status for Claude Code + GPT/Codex (operator's primary), and BYOK API-key entry (Anthropic/OpenAI) stored in the OS-keychain secrets vault for other users. Gemini excluded (CLI deprecating). Backends exist (WP-KERNEL-004); this builds the config UI. OPERATOR_REQUESTED_ADDITION 2026-07-02.
microtasks.unlocks: Unlocks operator/other-user cloud-model access (plan login + BYOK key) so cloud lanes are reachable from the operator surface and enumerable by the MT-012 picker.
